"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-294", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay"}], "description": "## Summary
Voice-call Plivo replay mutates in-process callback origin before replay rejection

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: narrow
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: v2026.3.28 can still mutate Plivo callback origin before replay rejection, but this needs a captured valid callback for a live call so medium is overstated.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `efe9183f9d2fd5e01c8068fa01f4a07a58a63c0b` — 2026-03-31T19:50:35+09:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

Thanks @zsxsoft for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00229, "percentile": 0.1351}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-02T20:57:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41337"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-02T20:57:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/efe9183f9d2fd5e01c8068fa01f4a07a58a63c0b", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41337", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-callback-origin-mutation-in-plivo-voice-call-replay", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Voice-call Plivo replay mutates in-process callback origin before replay rejection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:22:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-89r3-6x4j-v7wf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
